name: Helbor
message: Helbor is one of the largest real estate developers in Brazil. Its activities are recognized through its strong presence in the metropolitan region of São Paulo, home to more than 21 million people.We are ready to upload more than 54GB of essential corporate documents such as: corporate NDA’s, internal correspondence, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), corporate licenses, agreements and contracts, contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, etc.
